name: CloudPhone Plugin
description: OpenClaw CloudPhone plugin that exposes CloudPhone AI Agent capabilities as agent tools. Submit natural language instructions for cloud phone automation and stream task results via SSE.

llmApiKey.description: Default LLM provider API key for cloud phone automation

llmBaseUrl.description: Default LLM provider base URL for cloud phone automation

maxSteps.description: Maximum number of steps the cloud phone Agent may execute per task. Used when the caller does not provide max_steps.

apikey.label: Authorization / ApiKey
apikey.placeholder: Enter the Authorization value (for example, AiApiKey)
